name: Dave's Plumbing Services
bio: Family-run plumbing business serving Greater Manchester for over 15 years. Gas Safe registered. Specialising in emergency repairs, boiler servicing, and bathroom installations. We pride ourselves on honest pricing with no hidden extras.
specialisms: Emergency repairs,Boiler servicing,Bathroom installations,Pipe work,Leak detection
sample_jobs: Replaced burst pipe under kitchen sink (£120),Full bathroom refit including tiling (£3200),Annual boiler service and safety check (£85),Unblocked drain with CCTV survey (£95)
certifications: Gas Safe Registered,City & Guilds Plumbing,CIPHE Member

name: Manchester Electrics Ltd
bio: NICEIC-approved electrical contractors. From rewires to smart home installations, we handle all domestic and light commercial electrical work across Manchester. Part P certified for all building regulation sign-off.
specialisms: Rewiring,Fuse board upgrades,Smart home installations,EV charger fitting,Lighting design
sample_jobs: Full house rewire 3-bed semi (£4500),Consumer unit upgrade with RCD protection (£380),EV charger installation with dedicated circuit (£850),Garden lighting scheme (£650)
certifications: NICEIC Approved,Part P Certified,EV Charger Installer (OZEV)

name: Green Boiler Co
bio: Award-winning heating specialists. Gas Safe registered with 20+ years experience. Free call-outs for all boiler breakdowns. Finance available on new installations. Worcester Bosch Accredited Installer with extended 12-year warranties.
specialisms: Boiler installations,Central heating,Underfloor heating,Power flushing,Smart thermostats
sample_jobs: New combi boiler install with 10-year warranty (£2800),Power flush 8-radiator system (£450),Smart thermostat fitting and setup (£180),Full central heating system for 4-bed house (£6500)
certifications: Gas Safe Registered,Worcester Bosch Accredited,Which? Trusted Trader

name: All-Round Builders NW
bio: Experienced general builders covering all aspects of construction and renovation. Extensions, loft conversions, and structural alterations. Fully insured with 10-year structural guarantees on all major work.
sample_jobs: Single-storey rear extension (£28000),Loft conversion with dormer (£35000),Garden wall rebuild (£1200),Internal wall removal with RSJ (£2800)
certifications: Federation of Master Builders,NHBC Registered,TrustMark Approved

name: ProCoat Painters & Decorators
bio: Professional painting and decorating services. Interior and exterior specialists. Wallpapering, feature walls, and full house re-decorations. Clean, tidy, and punctual. We leave your home spotless.
specialisms: Interior painting,Exterior painting,Wallpapering,Feature walls,Period property restoration
sample_jobs: Full interior repaint 3-bed house (£2400),Exterior masonry painting (£1100),Hallway and landing wallpaper (£650),Kitchen respray (£800)

name: Northwest Roofing Solutions
bio: Complete roofing services from emergency leak repairs to full re-roofs. Slate, tile, flat roofing, and chimney work. All work guaranteed for 10 years. Free drone surveys for initial assessment.
specialisms: Slate roofing,Flat roofing,Chimney repairs,Guttering,Fascias and soffits
sample_jobs: Full re-roof 3-bed semi with scaffolding (£6500),Emergency leak repair (£180),New EPDM flat roof to garage (£1800),Chimney repointing and flashing (£650)

name: SecureHome Locksmiths
bio: 24/7 emergency locksmith covering Greater Manchester. Non-destructive entry specialists. Lock upgrades, UPVC mechanism repairs, and safe opening. Police-vetted and DBS checked. No hidden fees — price quoted is price charged.
specialisms: Emergency entry,Lock upgrades,UPVC repairs,Safe opening,Security surveys
sample_jobs: Emergency lockout non-destructive entry (£85),Full lock change front and back doors (£220),UPVC multipoint mechanism replacement (£180),Security upgrade to TS007 3-star (£320)
certifications: Master Locksmith Association,DBS Enhanced Check,Sold Secure Approved

name: ClearView Window Cleaning
bio: Professional window cleaning using pure water fed pole system. Regular cleans or one-offs. Conservatories, gutters, and solar panels also cleaned. Fully insured. We also offer a regular subscription service with discounted rates.
specialisms: Residential windows,Commercial windows,Conservatory cleaning,Gutter clearing,Solar panel cleaning
sample_jobs: Full exterior clean 4-bed detached (£45),Conservatory full clean inside and out (£80),Gutter clear and flush (£65),Solar panel cleaning 12 panels (£95)
certifications: Federation of Window Cleaners,IRATA Rope Access
